prompt:
You are shown one page from a SEC 10-K filing rendered as an image.
Item "15. Exhibits, Financial Statement Schedules" ENDS on this page; the next section is "Item 16. Form 10-K Summary".
Locate the bottom edge of Item 15's text on the page.
- If the "Item 16" heading is visible on this page, then Item 15 ends on the line directly ABOVE that heading.
- Otherwise, Item 15 continues to the bottom of the page.
Then transcribe VERBATIM the LAST 5 lines of Item 15 immediately before it ends. These must be the FINAL lines right before the section ends, NOT lines from the top or middle of the page. Ignore running headers, page numbers, footers.
Output ONLY the transcribed text, no commentary, no quotes, no formatting.
text:
(1) Indicates a filing of SolarCity
(2) Indicates a filing of Maxwell Technologies, Inc.
ITEM 16. SUMMARY
None.
